description: Swapped broken Google OAuth route targets for Gemini API-key routes (`google/gemini-2.5-pro` and `google/gemini-2.5-flash`) in defaults/docs/example config, marked them per-token, and added Google API key env-var tests.

asi.hypothesis: Replacing non-functional google-antigravity routing-chain entries with per-token Gemini API-key targets is a real routing robustness improvement; add minimal tests for GOOGLE_API_KEY resolution to avoid config drift
asi.next_action_hint: If desired, add balance-fetcher support for Gemini billing/quota APIs so per-token Google routes gain richer balance/UVI visibility too
